diagrams.title: E-Waste Components and Hazards
diagrams.description: Shows breakdown of electronic device into components with associated toxic substances
elements: Circuit Boards - Gold, Silver, Copper, Lead
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where toxic substances are located in common electronics

diagrams.title: E-Waste Pollution Pathway
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how improper e-waste handling causes environmental and health impacts
elements: Release of toxic substances (dioxins, heavy metals)
diagrams.purpose: Understand chain of pollution from improper disposal to health impacts

diagrams.title: Hierarchy of E-Waste Management
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing preferred methods from most to least desirable
diagrams.purpose: Learn priority order for managing e-waste from most sustainable to least preferred

visuals.title: E Waste Pollutants
visuals.description: Visual diagram for e waste pollutants
